commit.message:
Fix jieba debug log suppression: set level after import

jieba resets its logger to DEBUG in __init__.py, so the level
must be set after import to take effect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add macOS GPU warning for GPT-SoVITS v3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Suppress jieba DEBUG logs in Chinese text processing for v1/v2/v3

Set jieba logger level to WARNING before importing tone_sandhi
(which triggers jieba import) to hide verbose dictionary building logs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove tqdm dependency and add configurable CFM sample_steps for GPT-SoVITS v3

- Replace tqdm with plain range loops and v1-style benchmark logging
- Add --sample_steps arg (default: 4, original: 32) for CFM inference
- Add benchmark timing for CFM loop iterations
- Replace tqdm.write with logger.info for EOS message

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove opencc dependency from GPT-SoVITS v3

Same change as v2: set enable_non_tradional_chinese default to False,
make OpenCC import lazy, and remove opencc-python-reimplemented from
requirements.txt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove opencc dependency by disabling non-traditional Chinese by default

Set enable_non_tradional_chinese default to False in G2PWPinyin and make
OpenCC import lazy so it is only loaded when the feature is enabled.
Remove opencc-python-reimplemented from requirements.txt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add macOS GPU warning for GPT-SoVITS v2

Warn users that the model is not optimized for macOS GPU and suggest
using -e 1 option, consistent with the v1 implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Enable copy_blob_data optimization in GPT-SoVITS v2

Use ailia version check to enable copy_blob_data for KV cache transfer
in the sdec loop, avoiding redundant data copies between input/output
blobs. Consistent with the v1 implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace tqdm with benchmark logging in GPT-SoVITS v2

Remove tqdm dependency and use range loop with logger-based benchmark
timing, consistent with the v1 implementation style.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Chinese language support for GPT-SoVITS v2

Add Chinese G2P (text-to-phoneme) pipeline using jieba, pypinyin, G2PW and tone sandhi rules.
Implement BERT feature extraction using chinese-roberta-wwm-ext-large ONNX model for Chinese text,
while keeping zero vectors for Japanese and English. Port text processing modules from v3 implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Match official BEVFormer/nuScenes Box.render() drawing convention

Update draw_3d_bbox_on_camera to match the official nuScenes devkit

readme_html:
The collection of pre-trained, state-of-the-art AI models.

About ailia SDK

ailia SDK is a self-contained, cross-platform, high-speed inference SDK for AI. The ailia SDK provides a consistent C++ API across Windows, Mac, Linux, iOS, Android, Jetson, and Raspberry Pi platforms. It also supports Unity (C#), Python, Rust, Flutter(Dart) and JNI for efficient AI implementation. The ailia SDK makes extensive use of the GPU through Vulkan and Metal to enable accelerated computing.
